hook.command:
.claude/hooks/pyrun -c "
import json, sys, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
ti = d.get('tool_input', {})
p = ti.get('file_path', '')
if not p or not p.endswith(('.ts', '.tsx')):
    sys.exit(0)
skip = ['node_modules', '__tests__', '.spec.', '.test.', '.d.ts']
if any(s in p for s in skip):
    sys.exit(0)
content = ti.get('content', '') or ti.get('new_string', '')
if not content:
    sys.exit(0)
generic = re.findall(r'(?:function|const|let|var)\s+(getData|handleChange|doStuff|processData|handleSubmit|fetchData|updateState)\b', content)
if generic:
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': f'[NAMING] Generic function name detected: {generic[0]}. Use domain-specific naming instead.'}))
sys.exit(0)
"
